title: RESTORE - 211info
text: ALBANY AREA RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donations are accepted and pickup services are available. 1225 6th Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Shopping hours Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Donation hours Wednesday-Friday 9am-4:30pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 924-1450 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 924-1450 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Greater Albany Public Schools SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
